title: Single construction regulator prospectus
body: "​​The Grenfell Tower Inquiry’s first recommendation in its Phase 2 report was for the government to create a single regulator that draws together functions relating to the construction industry.   ​We are consulting on proposals to establish a single construction regulator. The proposed changes intend to reduce fragmentation in how the sector is regulated and drive culture change in the industry. ​   To request a translation or accessible version of this consultation, email regulatoryreform@communities.gov.uk.  "
